Package shelter.repository

package shelter.repository
Repository interfaces that abstract persistent storage for each aggregate root. Service-layer code depends only on these interfaces, keeping business logic independent of the underlying storage format (CSV, in-memory, or otherwise).
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    shelter.repository.csv
    CSV-backed implementations of the repository interfaces.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    AdopterRepository
    Defines persistence operations for Adopter records.
    AdoptionRequestRepository
    Defines persistence operations for AdoptionRequest records.
    AnimalRepository
    Defines persistence operations for Animal records.
    AuditRepository
    Defines persistence operations for audit log entries across all service operations.
    ShelterRepository
    Defines persistence operations for Shelter records.
    TransferRequestRepository
    Defines persistence operations for TransferRequest records.
    VaccinationRecordRepository
    Defines persistence operations for VaccinationRecord records.
    VaccineTypeRepository
    Defines persistence operations for VaccineType records.
